scripts.test: pnpm test:contracts && pnpm test:sdk && pnpm test:compiler && pnpm test:ponder
scripts.test:contracts:fast: ./scripts/anvil-fork.sh ensure && cd packages/contracts && FOUNDRY_PROFILE=lite forge test
scripts.test:contracts:ci: ./scripts/anvil-fork.sh ensure && cd packages/contracts && FOUNDRY_PROFILE=ci forge test
scripts.test:e2e:sepolia: CHAIN_ID=84532 MOCK_LLM=1 pnpm --filter @trust-zones/e2e exec vitest run test/sync-timing.test.ts --testTimeout 600000
scripts.ponder:sepolia: cd packages/ponder && PONDER_AGREEMENT_REGISTRY=0x1Ae7002901FEa59dC43500Fc4297f336C4aF3Aac PONDER_RESOURCE_TOKEN_REGISTRY=0x6BA6F01C970Ed7C1F9Faa47b94cf02aeF789c10b PONDER_TEMPTATION_VAULT=0x54c77853e796bB79B01222827cb99354c79cee54 PONDER_CHAIN_ID=84532 PONDER_RPC_URL=https://base-sepolia.g.alchemy.com/v2/${ALCHEMY_API_KEY} PONDER_START_BLOCK=39151830 pnpm ponder dev --port 42069
